# zabbix_host_group (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix host group by ID or name. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by ID
data "zabbix_host_group" "by_id" {
  id = "2"
}

# Look up by name
data "zabbix_host_group" "by_name" {
  name = "Linux servers"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the host group. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Display name of the host group. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
